cases.name: pull-empty
cases.covers: Active subscription, zero commits, cursor advanced anyway (SPEC.md §4.5)

cases.name: commits-incremental
cases.covers: Two COMMIT frames; row codec exercising every column type incl. NULLs, bytes, non-BMP strings; scope map on changes

cases.name: bootstrap-segments
cases.covers: SEGMENT_REF (sqlite, with signed URL) + SEGMENT_REF (rows, no URL) + SEGMENT_INLINE; incomplete bootstrapState in SUB_END

cases.name: push-conflict
cases.covers: Rejected commit; conflict record with serverVersion + serverRow

cases.name: push-cached
cases.covers: Idempotent replay: status = cached, original results

cases.name: subscription-revoked
cases.covers: SUB_START status revoked, reason sync.scope_revoked, empty effective scopes

cases.name: cursor-reset
cases.covers: SUB_START status reset, reason sync.cursor_expired (horizon signal)

cases.name: error-mid-stream
cases.covers: RESP_HEADER + SUB_START + ERROR + END: partially streamed failure (SPEC.md §1.4 abort rule)

cases.name: unknown-frame-skip
cases.covers: A reserved/unknown frame type between known frames — MUST decode with the frame skipped (SPEC.md §9)

cases.name: commit-crdt-merge
cases.covers: A COMMIT upsert carrying a server-merged crdt column (§2.4 tag 8, §5.10.3): merged bytes ride the ordinary change payload, no CRDT-specific frame

cases.name: lease-issued
cases.covers: RESP_HEADER + LEASE (§7.3.2) + active subscription: pins the new 0x19 frame (leaseId, expiresAtMs) in its grammar position
